content.fact: MOM brand primary colors: Ink #001423 (dark background), Walnut #3B1F0A (warm accent/borders), Signal #0066B1 (primary action blue), Archive #FFCC2C (gold highlight), Paper #FFF5E5 (light surface text). Each has a 50-900 scale for variations.
content.why: Consistent visual identity across all MOM artifacts — graph visualization, future UI components, documentation.
content.source: User-provided color palette generated for MOM design system, 2026-04-19.
